text: Our brand focuses on combining premium quality with modern streetwear aesthetics. We aim to provide stylish yet comfortable clothing that resonates with Gen Z and young adults. Unlike mass-produced fashion, our designs are curated to stand out and make a statement. We prioritize customer satisfaction, fast support, and consistent quality.

Cash on Delivery is available for most locations across India. Customers opting for COD may be required to pay a small additional handling fee. COD orders are confirmed via phone or SMS before processing. If a COD order is rejected at delivery, future COD access may be restricted. Customers are encouraged to use prepaid options for faster processing and delivery.

Delivery timelines depend on the customer’s location. Orders within metro cities are typically delivered within 3 to 4 days, while tier-2 and tier-3 cities may take 5 to 7 days. Remote or rural locations may take up to 8 to 10 days. Delivery timelines may vary during festive seasons or due to unforeseen circumstances. Customers can track their orders in real-time using the tracking link provided after shipment.

We regularly offer discounts and seasonal sales for our customers. New users may receive welcome discounts, while existing customers can benefit from festive offers and limited-time deals. Discount codes can be applied during checkout. Terms and conditions apply for each offer, including minimum order value and validity period.

Customers frequently ask about delivery time, return policies, and product quality. We aim to provide clear and transparent answers to all queries. If a question is not covered in our FAQ section, customers can reach out to support for assistance. Our goal is to ensure a smooth and satisfying shopping experience.

We use high-quality cotton blends to ensure softness, durability, and long-lasting color. The fabric is pre-shrunk to prevent size changes after washing. Our materials are skin-friendly and suitable for all-day wear. The stitching and finishing are done with precision to maintain premium quality standards. Each product goes through a quality check before shipping.

Our oversized t-shirts are designed for comfort, style, and a modern streetwear look. They are made with premium cotton fabric that ensures breathability and durability. The relaxed fit provides extra room and enhances overall comfort. These t-shirts are ideal for casual wear, gym sessions, or daily outings. Available in multiple colors and designs, they reflect a bold and trendy fashion statement.

We support multiple payment methods including UPI, debit cards, credit cards, net banking, and Cash on Delivery (COD). All online transactions are secured using encrypted payment gateways to ensure customer safety. COD is available for selected pin codes with a small additional charge. Customers can choose their preferred payment option at checkout. In case of failed transactions, the amount is automatically refunded within 3 to 5 business days.

We offer a 7-day return and refund policy for all eligible products. Customers can initiate a return if the product is damaged, defective, or does not match the description. To start a return, customers must provide proof such as images or videos. Once approved, the product will be picked up and inspected. Refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days after successful quality check. Items that are used, washed, or without original packaging may not be eligible for return. Refunds are issued to the original payment method.

We offer shipping across all major cities and towns in India. Orders are processed within 24 to 48 hours after confirmation. Once shipped, delivery typically takes between 3 to 7 business days depending on the customer’s location. Metro cities usually receive orders faster, while remote areas may take slightly longer. Customers will receive a tracking link via SMS or email once the order is shipped. We partner with reliable courier services to ensure safe and timely delivery. In case of unexpected delays due to weather or logistics issues, customers are notified proactively.

We offer sizes ranging from S to XXL. Customers are advised to refer to the size chart available on the product page before placing an order. Oversized fits are intentionally designed to be loose, so customers preferring a regular fit may consider sizing down. If unsure, customers can contact support for personalized size recommendations.

To maintain product quality, it is recommended to wash garments in cold water and avoid using harsh detergents. Do not bleach or tumble dry at high temperatures. Iron inside-out to protect prints and fabric texture. Following these instructions will ensure long-lasting color and fabric quality.
